title: January 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 16''' is the 16th day of the year. 349 days (350 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Peter Lurie]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Garth Ennis]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Lin-Manuel Miranda]] is born.
*1980 – [[Star Wars Weekly 99|''Star Wars Weekly'' 99]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 3|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 3]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Jedi Crash]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2009 – "[[Smoke 'Em Out]]" published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Phantom Menace]]'' released.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Maul, Sith Apprentice]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Battle for Naboo]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Republic Special 1|''Age of Republic Special'' 1]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Fuse Games]] is founded.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories Volume 2 – Scum and Villainy]]'' published.
<noinclude>
